rationale: Educ. Code §49.105 governs notice to property owners in inter-district attendance credit agreements. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict arises.
quote: As soon as practicable after the agreement is executed, the districts involved shall notify each affected property owner and the appraisal district in which the affected property is located.
_note: Rule text concerns Chapter 41 attendance credit notice procedures, not homestead exemption valuation. No overlap with proposed change.
